common.tagline: Empty your head — get your day planned
common.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
common.notFoundDescription: This page doesn’t seem to exist.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to keep planning your day

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: A few seconds and your head is free

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we’ll send you a link to set a new password
forgotPassword.sentDescription: If an account exists for {email}, we’ve sent it a password reset link.
forgotPassword.devLinkNotice: Development mode: the link was printed to the server console.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can sign in now.
resetPassword.invalidTokenTitle: This link is no longer valid
resetPassword.invalidTokenDescription: The link has expired or was already used. Request a new one.

validation.nameTooLong: Name is too long (60 characters max)
validation.emailInvalid: That doesn’t look like a valid email
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordTooLong: Password is too long (72 characters max)

errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists
errors.invalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.unknown: The request failed. Please try again.

capture.title: What’s on your mind right now?
capture.hint: Write or dictate everything you need to do. Don’t think about structure — just dump whatever is in your head.
capture.placeholder: For example: call mum, finish the report by Friday, buy groceries, book a doctor’s appointment…

results.title: Your tasks
results.empty: The AI didn’t find any tasks in this text. Try being more specific.

voice.unsupported: Voice input isn’t supported in this browser
voice.permissionDenied: No microphone access. Allow it in your browser settings.
voice.noSpeech: We didn’t hear anything. Try again.

status.notConfigured: AI isn’t configured — add OPENROUTER_API_KEY to .env
